description_long: This object is a stylized stack of three golden-brown pancakes, each with a slightly polygonal, faceted appearance. On top of the stack are two square pats of butter, rendered in a pale yellow color, positioned side by side. A thick, dark golden stream of syrup cascades diagonally across the pancakes, pooling slightly at the base and forming a small drop on the surface below. The pancakes are not placed on any plate or serving surface, and the stack sits directly on the ground. The overall look is cartoonish and simplified, with clean edges and minimal surface detail. The object is compact and visually appealing, evoking a classic breakfast food presentation.
description: A stylized stack of three golden-brown pancakes with two butter pats and a stream of syrup, directly on the ground with no plate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full stack, both butter pats, and the syrup stream running diagonally with a syrup drop in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered pancakes, the butter pats, and the syrup stream ending in a drop to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the syrup stream and butter visible, but the syrup drop is less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pancake layers, butter pats, and the syrup drop now on the left.
